blended.narrative: Bretton Woods is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
